title: PLNT / BELGIUM
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A replicability roadmap for the PLNT vertical farm in Antwerp, Belgium, offering practical guidance on establishing sustainable urban agriculture and fair food supply chains. It details the project’s innovative vertical farming technology, business model, funding strategies, stakeholder partnerships, best practices, and contextual factors essential for replication.
